title: docs: scalar markdown sources, /docs/guides surface, dashboard rail copy buttons
author: ElliotEtag
pr_body_excerpt:
Rework of the gen.pollinations.ai developer docs surface, plus matching changes to the enter dashboard rail.

## gen.pollinations.ai

- Extracted Scalar prose into per-concept markdown files under `gen.pollinations.ai/src/docs/*.md`. Single source of truth feeds Scalar tag descriptions, `/docs/llm.txt`, and the guides pages.
- New `/docs/guides` + `/docs/guides/{byop,cli,mcp}` pages for integration content that doesn't fit the API reference.
- Dark Pollinations header (brand + nav pills) above Scalar, plus a floating cluster: **Copy for LLMs** (context-aware per page) and **OpenAPI Doc** dropdown (JSON / YAML).
- Scalar sidebar reorganized via `x-tagGroups`: Get Started / Reference / Generation / Resources. Modality tags renamed: `Text Generation` → `Text`, etc.
- `GET /docs/llm.txt?section=api|byop|cli|mcp` slices the LLM doc.
- `GET /docs/open-api/generate-schema?format=yaml` serves the schema as YAML.

## enter.pollinations.ai

- Dashboard rail docs section: copy-to-clipboard buttons for **API / BYOP / CLI / MCP Server**, each backed by the matching `?section=` slice.
- Media Storage row removed — folded into the API copy.

## pollinations.ai

- Updated `socialLinks.ts` anchor fragments to match the renamed Scalar tags.

## Tests

Added coverage for the YAML schema endpoint, guides index + `:id` + 404, and `/docs/llm.txt?section=`.

## Follow-up

#11296 — consolidate the remaining duplicate docs surface on enter (most of `enter.pollinations.ai/src/routes/docs.ts` is now dead or shadowed by gen).

gist.headline: Docs for humans and bots
gist.blurb: We've completely overhauled our developer docs to make building with Pollinations even easier. Plus, new one-click 'Copy for LLMs' buttons mean your AI assistant can read the docs as fast as you do.
gist.summary: Rebuilt the gen.pollinations.ai docs surface with modular markdown sources, added new /docs/guides pages, and introduced context-aware 'Copy for LLMs' buttons to the dashboard rail.
gist.impact: Developers can now grab context-aware API, BYOP, CLI, or MCP documentation with a single click to paste directly into their AI coding assistants.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee acting as a librarian, handing neatly organized files to the Monitor Robot (representing the LLM). A cozy library or study desk setting.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee mascot wearing tiny reading glasses, handing a glowing stack of organized markdown files to a chunky Monitor Robot sitting at a wooden library desk. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley, cozy library vibes. Text in pixel font: 'DOCS'.
